ab: I pitoay toki^ kako a talapicodadan anini^ a romi’ad.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Misatapang to! Micomod to ko singsi^, sowal sato ko kakeridan, "Kalomowad! Mita’ong!" saan.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Sowal sa kami a mapo:long, “Nga’ay ho^ singisi^!" saan.
Yo misatapang to kami a minanam i, pasifana’en no singsi^ kami to pisa’osi^.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Pangcah language of numbers.

ab: Do^doen niyam ko piasip no singsi^, o sa’osi^ a sorit ko radiwen no niyam.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Adihay ko ninanaman niyam a sowal no Pangcah.
en: I have learned many Pangcah languages.

ab: Talapicodadan kako to romi’ami’ad, mararid kako a minanam to sowal no Pangcah, patengilen ako ci ina^.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Pangcah language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
